author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Coffee Talk Tokyo reveals Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch physical release, pre-orders open

Coffee Talk Tokyo will have a physical release on both Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch, according to retailer listings. Stores list it for September 4, 2026. PM Studios will be distributing.  Note that the Nintendo Switch 2 version will be offered on a full cartridge. It will not be a game-key card release. Below is an overview of the title:...

The post Coffee Talk Tokyo reveals Nintendo Switch 2 and Switch physical release, pre-orders open appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Mineru Construct amiibo release date finally revealed

We’ve been waiting a long time for this one, but Nintendo just provided the release date for the Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom Mineru Construct amiibo. It’s slated for September 17, 2026. The Mineru Construct amiibo has articulated arms that can be moved around. Nintendo says that it has “a fair bit of freedom to its movement”, allowing for different...

The post Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom – Mineru Construct amiibo release date finally revealed appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
List of all prices for Nintendo Switch 2 Upgrade Packs

Various store pages confirm pricing for all Nintendo Switch 2 Upgrade Packs that will be available. There are a variety of price points, with some costing as much as $20. On the other hand, many are free – those these are from third-parties. Here’s the full roundup: 4PGP – $4.99 A-Train: All Aboard Tourism – $6.99 Animal Crossing: New Horizons...

The post List of all prices for Nintendo Switch 2 Upgrade Packs appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide revealed, pre-orders open

The brand new Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide has been revealed, which is coming this summer. The book celebrates 30 years of Pokemon history. With more than 300 pages included, fans can expect coverage of Pokemon characters from every region on all platforms. The book covers the games, anime, TCG, and more. Here’s some additional information from the product description: Ever...

The post Pokemon Deluxe Character Guide revealed, pre-orders open appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Nintendo announces limited time Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle

Today, Nintendo announced the brand new Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle, which will be available at retailers. This can be purchased starting in early June. The bundle includes a Nintendo Switch 2 system and a download code that can be redeemed for a digital version of one select game. Fans can choose between Mario Kart World, Donkey Kong Bananza,...

The post Nintendo announces limited time Switch 2: Choose Your Game Bundle appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer

Indiana Jones and the Great Circle just received a new Nintendo Switch 2 version, and to celebrate, we’ve got the game’s launch trailer. The first-person adventure game hits the console feature complete and even supports motion controls. Plenty of information about the game can be found in the following overview: Uncover one of history’s greatest mysteries in Indiana Jones and...

The post Indiana Jones and the Great Circle Nintendo Switch 2 launch trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition gets Rinwell character trailer

Another character trailer is here for Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition, and now we have a look at Rinwell. At one point of the game, she collapses in front of Alphen and Shionne after she becomes warn down. Rinwell ends up joining them to help rescue the resistance force in Cyslodia. Here’s an overview of the game: For...

The post Tales of Arise: Beyond the Dawn Edition gets Rinwell character trailer appeared first on Nintendo Everything.

author: Nintendo Everything
text:
One Military Camp coming to Nintendo Switch 2

Abylight is working on a Nintendo Switch 2 version of One Military Camp, the company revealed today. One Military Camp is a strategy / base building game. The Nintendo Switch 2 version includes the full campaign, Sandbox Mode, every biome introduced later on PC (Forest, Desert, Snow, Jungle, and Sand Desert), and full customization options. Abylight is planning a new...

The post One Military Camp coming to Nintendo Switch 2 appeared first on Nintendo Everything.
